entries.text: Right now the wiki mostly has raw source imports and operational reports. This tab becomes useful once syntheses, entities, or concepts start getting written.

entries.name: text
entries.text: These are imported insights clustered from external history; use them to review what imports surfaced before any of it graduates into durable memory.

entries.name: text
entries.text: This is the compiled memory wiki surface the system can search and reason over; use it to inspect actual memory pages, claims, open questions, and contradictions rather than raw imported source chats.

entries.name: text
entries.text: This is the raw dream diary the system writes while replaying and consolidating memory; use it to inspect what the memory system is noticing, and where it still looks noisy or thin.
